macro.toolHelp: Next(m, n)
Next2(m, n)
UnitVector2(A, B)
PointOnXY(x, y)
PointOnYZ(y, z)
PointOnXZ(x, z)
PointOnPlane(x, y, index)
PlanePoint(<Point>, <PlaneIndex>)
PlaneArrow(A, B, plane, width, head, shaft, connected?)

expression.label: A5
expression.exp: A4 + If[tooLong, Vector[(mhead * u)], If[connected, (-A4) + A, Vector[((-mshaft) * u)]]]

input.a0: Zip[PlanePoint[Pt, index], Pt, {A1, A2, A1, A3, A4, A5, A4, A6, A1, A7}]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneArrowNeck(A, B, plane, width, head, shaft)
PlaneArrowTail(A, B, plane, width, head, shaft, connected)

expression.label: A5
expression.exp: A4 + If[tooLong, Vector[(mhead * u)], If[connected, (-A4) + A, Vector[((-mshaft) * u)]]]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneArrows(A, B, plane, width, head, shaft, pad, connected)
PlaneTextX(A, plane, height, pad)

input.a0: Zip[PlanePoint[Pt, index], Pt, {X1, X2, X3, X4, X5}]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneTextY(A, plane, height, pad)

input.a0: Zip[PlanePoint[Pt, index], Pt, {X1, X2, X3, X4}]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneTextZ(A, plane, height, pad)

input.a0: Zip[PlanePoint[Pt, index], Pt, {Z1, Z2, Z3, Z4}]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneTextSquare(A, plane, height, pad)

input.a0: Zip[PlanePoint[Pt, index], Pt, {CtrlC + (pad * (1, 1)), CtrlC + (h * (1, 0)) + (pad * (-1, 1)), CtrlC + (h * (1, 1)) + (pad * (-1, -1)), CtrlC + (h * (0, 1)) + (pad * (1, -1))}]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneTextDelta(A, plane, height, pad)

input.a0: Zip[PlanePoint[Pt, index], Pt, {X1, X5, Midpoint[X2, X4]}]

macro.toolHelp: PlanePolygon(points, plane)
PlaneUnitVector(A, B, plane)
PlaneUnitNormalVector(A, B, plane)
ArrowNeck(A, B, width, head, shaft)
ArrowTail(A, B, width, head, shaft, connected)

expression.label: A5
expression.exp: A4 + If[tooLong, Vector[(mhead * u)], If[connected, (-A4) + A, Vector[((-mshaft) * u)]]]

input.a3: PlaneCharB[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]

input.a9: PlaneCharE[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]

input.a13: PlaneCharH[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]
input.a15: PlaneCharI[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0 / 2]

input.a19: PlaneCharK[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]
input.a21: PlaneCharL[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0 / 2]

input.a27: PlaneCharO[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]
input.a29: PlaneCharP[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]

input.a1: PlaneCharF[A, plane, h, b, xh, w0]

macro.toolHelp: PlaneString(string, anchor, plane, height, base, xheight, width, kerning)

input.a0: PlaneChar[ch, anch, plane, txtH, txtB, txtXH, txtW]

macro.toolHelp: StringWidth(str, height, xheight, width, kerning)
PlaneStringCentered(str, center, plane, reverse, height, base, xheight, width, kerning)

input.a0: PlaneChar[ch, anch, plane, txtH, txtB, txtXH, (s * txtW)]

macro.toolHelp: StringLeadingBottom(str, reversed, height, xheight, width, kerning)
StringLeadingTop(str, reversed, height, xheight, width, kerning)
StringTrailingBottom(str, reversed, height, xheight, width, kerning)
StringTrailingTop(str, reversed, height, xheight, width, kerning)
DimensionArrows(A, B, <right dir>, padding, arrowWidth, arrowHead, arrowShaft) )

caption.val: arrows are connected if shaft ratio >= 1

input.a0: {A, D, C, A, N1R, N1, T1, N1, N1L, A}
{B, F, E, B, N2L, N2, T2, N2, N2R, B}
